title: Management Executive
description:
Job Description:

  • Coordinate Junior High and Senior High Admissions, including Direct School Admission (DSA), Joint Admission Exercise (JAE) support, student enrolment, appeals, and parent/student communications
  • Manage admissions processes, including registration systems, databases, interview coordination, and enrolment documentation
  • Oversee Junior High student administrative matters, such as health and dental screenings, NRIC matters, surveys, orientation programmes, language programme coordination, and Sec 1 posting exercises
  • Plan and coordinate Parent-Teacher Meetings (PTMs), school tours, and open house events
  • Support Parent-In-Action (PAACT) activities, including logistics for meetings, events, membership registration, and fund-related administrative matters
  • Provide front-line support through reception and Student Services Centre (SSC) duties, including enquiries from parents, students, and external agencies
  • Assist with surveys, reporting, verification of student records, name card printing, and international student-related matters
  • Support development and ad-hoc projects such as school signage, donor and partnership boards
  • Requires strong organizational skills, stakeholder coordination, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple timelines across the academic year.

Requirements:

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills
  • A good team player with a high level of initiative and independence
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications
  • Minimum 2 years of relevant working experience in a school environment
  • Degree holder or equivalent qualification
  • Able to work effectively in a fast-paced environment and manage multiple tasks

postedCompany.description:
Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based QEHS consulting firm established by a team of experienced professionals committed to delivering comprehensive Environment, Workplace Safety & Health, and Quality solutions to organisations across various sectors.

Alongside our strong capabilities in QHSE Management System Auditing, Consulting, Outsourcing and Training, we also provide a wide range of manpower support services to meet the operational needs of industries in Singapore.

Our manpower services cover the deployment of qualified and experienced personnel, including:

  • WSH Officers, WSH Coordinators, ECOs, Safety Supervisors, Fire Safety personnel

  • Technical staff, Operations support staff

  • Receptionists, Administrative Executives, Customer Service personnel

  • Teachers, Student Care staff, Early Childhood assistants

  • Lab Assistants, Science/Technical support staff

  • Logistics, Warehouse, Production, and Field Support manpower

  • Other specialised manpower based on project requirements

With a team that brings together global expertise and strong local industry experience, Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd ensures clients receive reliable, cost-effective, and practical solutions that support compliance, enhance productivity, and promote workplace excellence.

We remain dedicated to delivering high-quality consulting services and dependable manpower support, helping organisations operate safely, efficiently, and successfully in today’s challenging business environment.
postedCompany.name: DYNAMIC SAFETY PTE. LTD.
